message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - jalapeño corn dog bites copy is live in the doc. Fair warning: I leaned into the nostalgia angle pretty hard here.
I'll read through it right now - nostalgia angle could work if it doesn't overshadow the actual product, yeah?
The product's the anchor - nostalgia is just the seasoning, not the whole dish. I kept the heat and the texture front and center.
Heat and texture matter - read it and tell me if the fry time ratios made it in there.
Looking at the fry time section - he nailed the crispy exterior part, but does the inside stay tender at that temperature or are we risking dry cornmeal?
That temp holds moisture if the oil's stable - Marcus knows that. Copy's solid. Send it.
